data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B50C3: I'll show you exactly how scary\nTEAM AQUA can be!
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B50F5: So you think you can stand up alone\nto TEAM AQUA's might...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5131: Yeah, so you are strong...\nBut there're a lot of us!
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5166: What's up with you?\nWhat does a single kid expect to do?
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B51B5: You don't know anything.\nQuit messing around with us!
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B51EB: Hey, I remember you from MT. CHIMNEY!\nIt's payback time!
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5248: Heh, it doesn't matter!\nWe bought ourselves some time!\pThe BOSS should have snatched what\nhe was after!
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B52B0:
ARCHIE: Not you again...\pYou've impeded our plans repeatedly,
but this time you're too late.\pThe RED ORB that rested atop
MT. PYRE...\lI, ARCHIE, claim it as mine!\pFufufu... Finally, I can realize my
grand design...\pCome on, crew!
It's SLATEPORT next!
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B53AB:
Oh, no...
This cannot happen...\pHow could they take the RED ORB?\pThe BLUE ORB and RED ORB must never
be separated. They belong together.\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
Hmm...\pFine!
You take the remaining BLUE ORB.\pPlease take after that foul man and
get the other ORB back!
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B54BE: The BLUE ORB you have been entrusted\nwith and the stolen RED ORB...\pThey must never be apart...\nSomething terrible will happen...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5540:
So...
KYOGRE has awoken...\pThe wondrous ORB that is said to have
becalmed the raging KYOGRE...\lIt is the BLUE ORB you bear.\pThat BLUE ORB was found buried inside
the CAVE OF ORIGIN in SOOTOPOLIS...\pThere is perhaps a link between
KYOGRE and the CAVE OF ORIGIN...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5647: That man, he returned the RED ORB.\pAre you going to return the BLUE ORB\nto its rightful place, too?
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B56AB: What's that?!\pIf the balance is not restored, there\nis no telling what could happen.\pYou will return the BLUE ORB to its\nrightful place, yes?
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5739: {PLAYER} handed the BLUE ORB to the\nold woman.
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5762: Yes...\nThe two ORBS should remain here.\pIt is how it should be for the good\nof all HOENN...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B57BE: The spirit of the sea...\pThat is what KYOGRE is said to be in\nPOKéMON form...\pIn the same manner that we and POKéMON\nhave life, the sea is alive...\pKYOGRE has taught us that...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B586F:
MT. PYRE is where we calm the spirits
of POKéMON that have passed on...\pThis is a high place where one can
see all of HOENN...\pThe disembodied spirits of POKéMON
must find solace here...\pIs it coincidence that you are here...\pWill you hear out my tale? A tale long
told in the HOENN region?
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5992:
It happened long, long ago...\pThe world was wracked by a ferocious
clash between the POKéMON of the sea\land the POKéMON of the land...\pThe POKéMON of the sea raised huge
waves and carved out oceans...\pThe POKéMON of the land raised
mountains and created continents...\pTheir fierce duel raged without end.\pThe world was engulfed in massive
infernos and vicious storms.\pThe BLUE ORB and the RED ORB brought
an end to the calamity.\pLight poured from the two ORBS and
becalmed the enraged adversaries.\pThe pair, made docile, dove deep into
the sea where eventually they\ldisappeared...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5BD7: I see...\nWell, that, too, is fine...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5BFC:
ARCHIE: You...
So you stopped KYOGRE...\pI shouldn't be surprised...\pI understand now that humans cannot
freely control the balance between\lthe land and the sea...\pSo I have come to return the
RED ORB...\pI doubt that we will cross paths again...
Farewell...
